UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Lovers card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Lovers card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Lovers card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Lovers card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Lovers card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Lovers card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the deep, passionate connection between Tristan and Isolde, symbolizing a strong ethical union and love that transcends obstacles.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid focusing too much on the specific medieval setting or the potion cup nearby, as the essence of this card lies in the lovers' emotional bond.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the The Lovers card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic, Orchestral, Strings, Harp, Flute, Romantic, Warm, Uplifting, instrumental
